title: So be good to yourself original Japanese
display_title: So be good to yourself original Japanese
wikitext:
[]: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by rhxphn » Sun Jun 13, 2021 4:54 am Hi everyone, glad to have found this board. Does anyone know what the original Japanese is for Rei's "so, be good to yourself" line from Episode 26? I've tried to search for it in the Japanese script but can't find it. I even tried to reverse Google Translate it but couldn't come up with anything close. Would be grateful if anyone can let me know in romaji and Japanese characters, if possible. Thanks in advance

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:02 am だから自分を大事にしなさい dakara jibun wo daiji ni shi nasai

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:07 am It's a pretty good translation. You could give alternatives like "So, take care of yourself", but I rather like "be good to yourself" as a reading for 大事にする.

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by rhxphn » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:36 am JoelcrNeto wrote: だから自分を大事にしなさい dakara jibun wo daiji ni shi nasai

Article: So be good to yourself original Japanese
[]: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by rhxphn » Sun Jun 13, 2021 4:54 am Hi everyone, glad to have found this board. Does anyone know what the original Japanese is for Rei's "so, be good to yourself" line from Episode 26? I've tried to search for it in the Japanese script but can't find it. I even tried to reverse Google Translate it but couldn't come up with anything close. Would be grateful if anyone can let me know in romaji and Japanese characters, if possible. Thanks in advance

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:02 am だから自分を大事にしなさい dakara jibun wo daiji ni shi nasai

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:07 am It's a pretty good translation. You could give alternatives like "So, take care of yourself", but I rather like "be good to yourself" as a reading for 大事にする.

[]: Re: "So, be good to yourself" - original Japanese?             Quote Post by rhxphn » Sun Jun 13, 2021 8:36 am JoelcrNeto wrote: だから自分を大事にしなさい dakara jibun wo daiji ni shi nasai
